query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '' THEN 1 END) as no_image, COUNT(CASE WHEN imageUrl LIKE '%unsplash%' THEN 1 END) as unsplash FROM recipes WHERE deletedAt IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3N8WHcqSjo6gJV1.8cb8a16f7acb --database ndjzMo7PxeapbzLjBHjsKj --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '' THEN 1 END) as no_image, COUNT(CASE WHEN imageUrl LIKE '%unsplash%' THEN 1 END) as unsplash FROM recipes WHERE deletedAt IS NULL;
